channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Vulnerability of Middle East Desalination Plants to Oil Spills
item.description: Desalination plants in the Middle East are increasingly critical as they provide the majority of drinking water in countries like Kuwait, Oman, and Saudi Arabia, with some plants covering up to 90% of...

item.title: Government to temporarily adopt 4-day work week in select executive offices to save energy
item.description: President Ferdinand 'Bongbong' Marcos Jr. announced that starting March 9, 2026, some offices under the executive branch will temporarily implement a four-day work week. This measure aims to conserve ...

item.title: Tom Hanks spotted celebrating Stephen Coniglio's AFL goal
item.description: During an AFL match, Hollywood actor Tom Hanks was seen in the crowd celebrating Stephen Coniglio's goal, drawing attention from fans and media alike. The Sydney Morning Herald captured the moment, hi...

item.title: University of Ilorin Teaching Hospital Faces Four-Month Water Shortage, Patients Rely on Sachet Water
item.description: For more than four months now, University of Ilorin Teaching Hospital in Kwara State don dey face serious wahala as dem no get running water. Patients and their families don dey forced to dey buy sach...

item.title: George Russell Leads Qualifying at Australian GP Following Verstappen Incident
item.description: The 2026 Formula 1 season kicks off at the Australian Grand Prix in Melbourne, marking the beginning of a new era with updated engine and chassis regulations and the introduction of Cadillac as a team...

item.title: Trial delays prolong justice for Penticton murder victim
item.description: More than four years after the tragic death of 22-year-old Taig Savage, his mother, Tracey Savage, continues to face the challenges of a delayed justice system in British Columbia. Taig was found crit...

item.title: British-Norwegian Band A1 Announces 'Love in the Philippines' Tour with Shows in Cebu and Manila in October 2026
item.description: British-Norwegian pop band A1, famous for their 90s hits, is making another comeback to the Philippines with their 'Love in the Philippines' tour. Following the success of their Valentine's Tour in Fe...

item.title: California Congressman Darrell Issa Announces Retirement, Impacting Republican Hold on House
item.description: California Republican Representative Darrell Issa has announced his retirement, just three months after stating he would not step down, citing the challenges of reelection in a newly redrawn district....

item.title: Environmental Impact of Dairy and Plant-Based Milks in Australia
item.description: Many Australians are shifting away from cow’s milk towards plant-based alternatives like oat, almond, and soy, driven by environmental, dietary, or taste considerations. Between 2015 and 2025, average...

item.title: Severe Tornadoes Cause Fatalities and Widespread Damage in Southern Michigan
item.description: On Friday, multiple tornadoes and strong storms swept through southern Michigan, resulting in at least four fatalities and injuring over a dozen people. Branch County, where Union City is situated, re...

item.title: Tinubu Urges Nigerians Not to Give in to Fear Amid Borno Terror Attacks and Abductions
item.description: President Bola Tinubu don talk to Nigerians say make dem no allow fear catch dem because of the recent terror attacks wey dey happen for different parts of the country, especially the one wey happen f...

item.title: Iran announces halt to attacks on neighbouring countries unless provoked
item.description: Iran’s President Masoud Pezeshkian has declared that Iran will not target its neighbouring countries anymore unless those countries initiate attacks first. This statement comes amid the ongoing Middle...

item.title: BFAR reports increased galunggong production and healthier stocks due to long-term closed fishing season in Palawan
item.description: The Bureau of Fisheries and Aquatic Resources (BFAR) announced that the annual closed fishing season for galunggong, also known as roundscad, has greatly helped in maintaining sustainable yields and b...

item.title: Quezon City residential fire along NIA Road controlled after displacing over 3,000 families
item.description: A large fire broke out in Barangay Pinyahan, Quezon City along NIA Road on the night of March 6, 2026, rapidly escalating in severity before being brought under control early on March 7. Fire authorit...

item.title: 6-Year-Old Deaf Boy and Family Deported to Colombia, Raising Concerns About Medical Care
item.description: A 6-year-old deaf boy from Hayward, California, was deported to Colombia along with his mother and sibling, according to his family attorney, Nikolas De Bremaeker. The attorney claims that U.S. Immigr...

item.title: MPs Demand Hustler Fund to Publish Loan Defaulters and Borrowing Details
item.description: Nairobi — The Hustler Fund, part of Kenya's Financial Inclusion initiative, has been told by MPs to disclose the names of loan defaulters within 14 days. During a session with the National Assembly's ...

item.title: Mother and daughter die in Oklahoma tornado as severe storms continue across central US
item.description: A devastating tornado struck western Oklahoma late on Thursday, tragically killing Jodie Owens, a 47-year-old substitute teacher, and her 13-year-old daughter, Lexi. The pair were found deceased insid...

item.title: Punjab and Haryana HC acquits Dera Sacha Sauda chief in journalist murder case
item.description: In a significant legal development, the Punjab and Haryana High Court on Saturday acquitted Gurmeet Ram Rahim, chief of Dera Sacha Sauda, in connection with the murder of journalist Ram Chander Chhatr...

item.title: Deputy Speaker Benjamin Kalu Denies Allegations of Forged Credentials
item.description: The Deputy Speaker of the House of Representatives, Benjamin Kalu, don burst out to dismiss claims say him forge him credentials. E come through statement wey him Chief Press Secretary, Levinus Nwabug...

item.title: Overview of the Escalating Iran–Israel–US Conflict and Its Regional Impact
item.description: The Middle East has entered another tense period of conflict as hostilities escalate between Israel, the United States, and Iran. Recent weeks have seen the death of Iran’s Supreme Leader Ayatollah Al...
